allow: Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('rules.json','utf8'\)\); const offers = d.offers; offers.forEach\(o => { const initDecision = \(o.rules||[]\).find\(r => r.name && r.name.includes\('INIT Decisión'\)\); if \(initDecision\) console.log\(o.offerCode, JSON.stringify\(initDecision, null, 2\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('rules.json','utf8'\)\); let maxId = 0; d.offers.forEach\(o => \(o.rules||[]\).forEach\(r => \(r.actions||[]\).forEach\(a => { if \(a.action_id > maxId\) maxId = a.action_id; }\)\)\); console.log\('max action_id:', maxId\);")
